◎简　　介  

　　Summertime arrives April 29, only on Netflix. One summer can change your life, whether you’re ready or not. This is what happens to Summer, Ale, Dario, Edo end Sofia. Three months spent under the sun of the Adriatic Coast to make them break with the past, question their beliefs and let them discover who they really are. A series with Ludovico Tersigni, Coco Rebecca Edogamhe, An...
